About the brand

Faces Canada has a 40-year history in Canada and offers a unique variety of high cosmetic and skincare products. All beauty, in our opinion, is about owning one's identity and wearing one's appearance with confidence. As a result, our products are designed to complement all ethnicities, skin types and tones, complexions, and textures. In addition, our products are cruelty-free and nontoxic. One of our fundamental beliefs is quality, which is why we absolutely oppose animal experimentation, adhere to the strictest standards, and only use healthy ingredients.

Today, we're a worldwide recognized company with a broad assortment of items that can represent any appearance or style, from floaty dresses to gorgeous dazzling and everything in between, all at affordable prices. This blog is going to let you give an entire overview of skincare in general and also Faces Canada products

Origin

We first entered the Indian market in 2009 and quickly established ourselves as a local favorite. To offer really global cosmetics to every Indian chest of drawers, our makeup products in India have developed unique inventions and formulations that blend worldwide cosmetic technology with the specific needs of Indian skin tones. We are proud of our wide assortment of high-quality, internationally recognized items. Our products are made in Germany, Italy, and Turkey using high-quality formulations to provide you with the best for your skin and thus we can assure you that you would get the best beauty products in India from our outlets.

Our goods are currently accessible in more than 140 cities and towns across India, at more than 1500 makeup physical outlets and chosen modern retail outlets. Our products are also available for the purchase of makeup products online at our own website as well as practically all third-party websites like Amazon, Nykaa, Purplle, Myntra, Flipkart and others. You can buy makeup online from any one of these sites.

How is it different from other brands?

The company, Faces Canada is known for its distinctive product developments and formulas, which combine foreign cosmetic technology with a thorough understanding of local consumers. 'Faces Canada is known for its on-trend, high-quality beauty products, and it is constantly innovating to provide top quality, internationally acclaimed cosmetics. They also make sure to use technology, data, and analytics as well as a culture of experimentation, and a constant drive to always improve their services to the clients. 

Why should we buy makeup and skincare from Faces Canada?

The main reason why you should buy makeup products from Faces Canada is because of their cruelty-free and refreshing nature.

  1. You will be protected from pollutants.
  2. Helps keep your skin soft, silky, and shining by hydrating it.
  3. Ingredients that are natural.
  4. Free of mineral oil.
  5. Free of parabens.
  6. No animal ingredients are used.

Makeup for Lips

Faces Canada Lipsticks

Liquid lipstick

Lipstick liquid is one of the most popular kinds of lipstick nowadays. Its main selling feature is its excellent pigmentation, which allows for somewhat complete coverage with just one application. These have the coloration of a solid lipstick and the thickness of a thick lip gloss. They should be put like a smooth layer on the lips, resembling candy apples, and streaks should be avoided during application. Liquid lipsticks are available in containers with a brush applicator or pump tubes and are easy to apply. Even in lighter tones, they are noted for their durability and ability to produce bold, stunning designs. Faces Canada liquid lipstick, for example, is ideal for everyday usage by folks who don't like reapplying makeup all the time.

Creamy lipstick

Traditional lipsticks that come in spherical jars with screwing and push-up lids are known as creamy lipsticks. These are extremely smooth and have a velvety texture. They do, however, exist in a solid form with a smooth, velvety feel. In comparison to the pigment present, their formula is generally oil or wax-heavy. They can be built up in color, depth, and transparency depending on how much is applied. Because the mixture glows brightly and does not appear too powerful, they are generally used to achieve natural looks that are excellent for day makeup. Creamy lipsticks are highly flexible, and they look great in virtually any shade. Nude colors have recently become increasingly trendy, and they look best in a creamy consistency. Faces Canada lipstick crayons are moisturizing and do not dry out lips, so even the brightest colors can be worn every day.

Matte lipstick

Matte lipstick is a relatively new style of lipstick. Due to the lower light reflection, authentic matte lipstick does not shine. True mattes are liquid, although bullet mattes have recently become accessible as well. Solid lipsticks require some emoluments to build, so they aren't absolutely matte. Because matte lipsticks can't be wiped off easily, they last a long time. Since the color concentration is greater than the oil or wax, they're strong and dark. Even while Faces Canada's weightless lipstick could last through the entire day, it is not recommended for persons who have dry or cracked lips on a daily basis. To avoid streaks and spots, exfoliate and moisturize lips before applying these products.

Crème matte lipstick

Because it is enriched with shea butter, jojoba oil, and almond oil, the lipstick has a creamy feel and glides on the lips effortlessly and smoothly. It sinks into a creamy finish and offers lips a silky-smooth feel, as the name suggests.

Liquid lipsticks are well-known for their great pigmentation, which provides your lips with a thick appearance. If you like your lips to be defined, everything you need now is a liquid lipstick in your cosmetic arsenal. Liquid lipsticks give your lips a flawless appearance without the use of a lip liner. Solid lipsticks, on the other hand, will require the use of a lip liner to give your lips a well-defined shape. In comparison to liquid lipstick, this takes a little longer.

Liquid Matte lipstick

The fact that liquid lipsticks do not smudge is one of their main advantages. Liquid lipsticks last longer, allowing a person to feel more confident, especially during a special occasion, without the need for touch-ups or escaping from people.

Lipstick Hacks

Lipsticks have become indispensable, as we carry them in our small handbags on a daily basis. Without lipstick, a handbag is completely empty. While the pandemic is unavoidable, wearing a mask causes lipstick to spill from under and also causes a stain. If you want to master that luscious lip, here are a few hacks you should know!

  • Use a translucent powder to keep the lipstick dry.
  • Use concealer to neutralize the pigments.
  • Draw an X with your lip liner and fill it if you want fuller lips.

Easy ways to apply Faces Canada lipstick flawlessly

Start by applying the lipstick to the middle of your upper lip, right below the Cupid's bow, with your preferred lipstick. If you're using a liquid lipstick, you can apply it directly from the bottle or the brush, or you can use a lipstick applicator for much more correct execution.

How to find the perfect lip shade

For the greatest effects, choose colors that are comparable to your undertone. If you have a yellow tone, go for warmer colors, and for pink undertones, search for lip tints with lavender or bluestones. Those with moderate undertones can pull off practically any color.

DIY lip color

 Mix some left-over lipstick with lip gloss or lip balm (lip gloss if you want a shinier finish). You can also add food coloring to your lip balm and voila! Your DIY lip color would be ready!

Faces Canada lip crayons

If you're looking for the perfect glide application and matte texture, look no farther than Faces Canada's stunning lip crayon . The matte lip crayon comes in a rainbow of colors that attract the eyes to make you shine out. Their selection of long-lasting lip crayons is ideal for both everyday and special occasions use. Do not forget to check out their Ultime Pro HD Intense Matte Lips + Primer Feather-light Creamy Matte and Ultime Pro Matte Lip Crayon.

Lipstick vs Lip crayon

Lip crayons are easier to apply and have a smoother finish. The lipstick may be creamy to apply, but this is something that only a few companies offer. Crayons are known for their smooth application. Because shea cream and avocado oil are mostly used, the ingredients are extremely nutritious.

Lip crayon hacks

  • Use It as a Creamy, Sheer Blush. Lip crayons are much thinner than regular lipstick, making them an excellent substitute if you forget to bring your blush.
  • Make a tinted lip balm out of it.
  • Make a list of things you want to remember and write them in your mirror.
  • Make some artwork for your walls.

Lip crayon tip and ticks

  • Begin by rubbing your lips together. It's crucial to cleanse your lips first before applying lipstick to achieve the right look.
  • Select the appropriate lip liner. The lip liner should be the same color as your lipstick.
  • Draw a line around the lips.
  • Draw a line across the bottom lip.
  • Use little strokes.
  • Blend well.

What is liquid lipstick?

It has lipstick pigment as well as the smoothness and shine of a gloss. Liquid lipstick leave a candy apple-like sheen on your lips without the stick, and you can also dab them with paper to help them look more matte.

How to properly apply liquid lipstick

  • Exfoliate before applying lipstick.
  • Moisturize, then wipe away the excess.
  • Draw a line over your lips.
  • Fill in the margins of your lip line with a blending brush.
  • Begin by applying lipstick to the inside of your lips.
  • 6. Use light layers to build up the color.
  • Correct any faults.

How to prep your lips for a liquid lipstick

Remove any dead skin from your lips with a lip scrub. Apply a moisturizing ChapStick or Lip Primer to your lips. Allow the product to permeate completely into the lips. Now it's time to apply the Liquid Lipstick.

Liquid lipstick hacks

We adore multipurpose products because they save us not only time but also valuable space in our makeup cabinets and purses. Keep on reading to learn more about the various applications of liquid lipstick.

  • As an alternative to a long-lasting blush
  • To create a contour
  • To use as a lip liner

How to line your lips properly

  • Lips should be exfoliated.
  • Lips should be moisturized.
  • Allow the balm to settle before using it.
  • Make sure your lips are primed.
  • Pick a color for your lip liner.
  • Make sure your lip liner is sharp.
  • Set the lip liner aside to warm up.
  • Slightly part your lips
  • Draw a line around your natural lip line.
  • Short, gentle strokes should be used.
  • Put the finishing touches on your ensemble.

How to change lip shape using lip liner

Cupid's Bow Defined: 

Your pout will stay on point if you keep a precise V in your cupid's bow (literally). However, if you make it too harsh, it can come across as a little eviler than you intended. Line the center of your upper lip, then use a golden or skin-toned shimmer crayon over your lip line to emphasize the peaks of those points so very lightly to define your cupid's bow. Integrate the top line into your skin a little with your finger. Your lips will look more prominent when the light touches them.

Overdrawn: 

If your upper lip is thinner than your lower lip, overdraw it (which is quite common). We mean "line slightly outside the natural boundaries of your lips" when we say "overdraw." You can even draw in a little deeper and then conceal the line where your lip stops with a matching lipstick. You'll need to employ the blot-once-and-reapply procedure with a coating of translucent powder if you want it to stick. It's also possible that a good setting spray will suffice.

How to choose the perfect lip liner shade

When it comes to lip liner and lipstick, the basic rule is to go one or two shades lighter than your lipstick while still staying in the same color family.

How to get plump lips using lip liner

  • Use your lip liner to accurately outline the original shape of your lips for gorgeous lips. The importance of a very good lip contour cannot be overstated, and the lip liner will help keep your lipstick from seeping into your lines.
  • When choosing a lip liner color, choose one that complements the color of your lipstick. If you want to make your lips stand out even more, use a deeper color of lip liner than lipstick. Give it a shot.
  • Use the lip liner to color your lips inside the outline to extend the life of your lipstick and achieve a more intense color finish.
  • It's time to put the lipstick on. Make sure to select a lipstick with a lot of coverage. This will allow you to generate a strong color impression, resulting in your lips appearing to have more fullness.

How to take care of your lips

  • Do not lick or touch your lips.
  • Stick to a Healthy Diet Plan.
  • Drink Plenty of Water to Stay Hydrated.
  • Take Off Your Makeup.
  • Keep Your Lips Moisturized During the Night.
  • Clean Your Lips.
  • Stimulate Your Lips.
  • Always keep a lip balm in your bag.

Why are lip balms important?

Lip balm's main function is to create an inotropic coating on the lip interface that seals moisture in the lips and protects them from the elements. Dry air, blustery winds, and breeze all take moisture away from the skin, causing the skin to dry out.

How often do you reapply lip balm?

Reapply constantly to keep your lips protected. During the day, you'll need six to eight coats, as a result, use it first thing every morning, finally at night regularly, and every few hours during the day.

How to find your signature red lipstick shade

Finding a hue that compliments your skin color and undertones is the most important component in choosing the appropriate red lipstick. Skin tone refers to the amount of melanin in the skin, which can range from light to dark, and undertones refer to the colors (red, blue, or yellow) that make up your unique complexion.

How to carry red lipstick?

  • Consider the rest of your make-up.
  • Lip liners aren't your adversary.
  • Allow your lips to do the talking.
  • Don't overlook the rest of your ensemble.
  • Bold red lips aren't always necessary.
  • Match the colors to your own.
  • The texture is also crucial.
  • In case you find 'the one,' there are no rules.

Makeup for Eyes

What is a kajal?

Kohl, also known as kajal or Kajol, is an ancient eye makeup prepared historically by pulverizing stibnite for use akin to mascara's charcoal.

What does applying kajal do for your face?

It's said to keep the eyes fresh and clean, as well as increase vision and strengthen them. It's also been used to prevent and treat eye conditions like blepharitis, cataracts, and conjunctivitis. It is said to protect against an evil eye.'

How to apply kajal in different ways?

Apply a dark kohl pencil to the top and bottom water lines, gliding from the inner to the outer corner. Smear the outline on the upper lid with a dry, smooth slanted brush to erase the lines and merge them. Smudge the kajal on the lower lid in the same way. Complete the look by applying layers of mascara.

Easy tricks to apply kajal quickly

Make a line along your top water line from within the inner corner to the outer parts to apply kajal. To make it easier, use your free hand to pull down on your lower eyelid and gaze up as you sketch. Use an eye smudger or swab to soften harsh lines.

What are eye pencils?

Eye pencils can be applied above the upper lashes, below the lower lashes, or both, as well as along the waterlines of the eyes. Its main function is to make the lashes look thicker, but it also brings interest and attention to the eyes and can affect the form of the eye.

What do they do?

Choosing the proper eyeliner color will assist you in achieving the look you desire. If you want to get a somewhat emphasized and dramatic look, for example, use a black pencil. Brown eye pencils are ideal for a softer, daytime look. Choose a colorful kohl pencil from the Faces Canada Absolute Kohl Ultimate the Gelato Collection if you're feeling really daring.

How to use eye pencils if you want to add a pop of color?

The advantage of using a pencil liner is the accuracy and control it provides. If drawing a straight line is difficult for you, use your eyeliner pencil to draw tiny dashes down your lash line (as near to it as possible) and then combine the dashes to form a smooth, clean line.

How to match eye pencil color with your outfit?

It’s always better to go for the opposite eye color to the color of the dress you're wearing. This emphasizes both your eyes and dress and does not bring in a monochromatic look.

 How to apply eyeliner properly?

  • Draw a line from the internal corner of the eye to the external corner of the eye in front of the mirror. Continue to keep the line as close to the root of your lashes as possible.
  • Keep the eyeliner line narrow and inconspicuous, similar to brown eyeliner, for a distinctive style. This will characterize the eye without screaming "I'm wearing eyeliner!"
  • Begin at the outer corners of your eyes and bring the liner inwards as close to your lash line as possible. Define the border slowly and deliberately. To give the illusion of more thick lashes, use eyeliner to fill up any gaps between your lashes. If you have any blemishes, use a Q-tip and makeup remover to clean them up.

Tips and tricks for eyeliner

If it is your first time, draw the outline using a kajal rather than a pencil liner. This will give you more stability and precision. You can also use cello tape to mark the outline in case you are going for a winged look.

Eyeliner hacks

  • Set your eyeliner with a matching eyeshadow to extend the life of your eye makeup.
  • For fascinating fluid liners, use a pencil liner as a tool.
  • With a wet liner brush and eyeshadow, create your own unique eyeliner.
  • For a quick eye lift, use white eyeliner as a forehead highlighter.
  • Warm the tip of a kohl liner with a lighter to make your own gel liner.

How can eyeliner change your face?

Dark eyeliners and mascara are popular in contrast to earthy-colored eyeshadows, which blend well with your skin tone and give you a firm, youthful appearance.

What is mascara?

Mascara is a restorative that is frequently used to enhance the appearance of the upper and lower eyelashes. It has the ability to hide, thicken, protract, and characterize the eyelashes.

Why do we use mascara?

Mascara benefits the eyes in a variety of ways. It hides lashes but can extend and volumeize them for more dazzling, larger-looking eyes. "fuller-looking lashes might help to give the eye area a more active appearance."

How to choose the perfect mascara according to your needs?

To lengthen and fall your lashes, look for a broader brush and a formulation with styling strands. If your lashes are stubbornly straight, an eyelash curling iron and Face Canada Waterproof Mascara is the best options. Adjust the brush's bent to your tops and figure out how to obtain the best twist.

Mascara tips and hacks

  • Take a step back; After you've applied mascara to the front of your lashes, as usual, look down and carefully apply mascara to the back of your lashes for an instant thickening effect.
  • Be adaptable.
  • Get warm and toasty.
  • Remove it with a brush.
  • Twirl instead of pumping.

How to prevent mascara from getting clumpy

  • Begin with a blank slate.
  • Wiggle your brush all the time.
  • Never put force on your mascara.
  • You should know when to throw away your mascara.
  • Try not to go overboard.
  • Add no water to the mix.

How to remove mascara without hurting your lashes?

  • Apply eye makeup remover to a cotton pad and press it to the eye.
  • Swipe downward and away after a few seconds.
  • To avoid smudges the next morning, gently clean mascara in between lashes with a Q-tip soaked in makeup remover.

What is eyeshadow?

Eye shadow is a cosmetic that is applied to the upper and lower eyelids to make the female's eyes stand out or appear more appealing. Eye shadow could also be used for the brow bones, under the eyes, and on the cheeks.

How to prep eyes?

  • Preparation of the skin: Before you begin applying makeup, it’s better to clean the eye region with micellar water to remove any debris that may have accumulated on the face.
  • Begin by applying an eye shadow primer.
  • It's a good idea to start with a primer to fix your eye makeup.
  • Still, have any dark spots? Use concealer.

How to apply and blend it properly?

  • Prepare your vision.
  • Make a foundation.
  • Your inner corner should be highlighted.
  • Make a crease in your skin.
  • It’s time for blending!

How to match eyeshadow with the outfit?

It's not necessary to match your eyeshadow to your ensemble. To be honest, assuming you do proper variety coordinating with, say, a shirt, it may be a little absurd. However, it's generally a good idea to coordinate your eyeshadow with your outfit by using reciprocal or similar colors.

Eyeshadow hacks

To produce a pale pink eyeshadow, combine dried beet powder and cocoa powder. To produce a deep mauve eyeshadow, combine cocoa powder, allspice, and dried beet powder. To generate a warm dazzling earthy colored tone, combine nutmeg and turmeric. Make yellow eyeshadow with turmeric powder.

What is a brow definer pencil?

An eyebrow definer might be a pencil, powder, shadow, or tint that is used to define the brows. Any sort of cosmetic that improves the look of a person's brows is referred to as an "eyebrow definer."

How to define brows to suit your face?

According to your face shape, you need to adjust your brows’ shape:

  • Oval- Soft angles and small arches.
  • Round- Lifted, angled arch.
  • Long- Flat brow that will make your face look shorter
  • Square- Strong, defined arch
  • Heart- High arches.
  • Diamond-rounded arches.

How to blend it properly?

Begin filling in your brow from the tail and work your way up using small, airy strokes. For the most consistent look, begin your strokes at the underside of your brow and work outward toward your sanctuary. Mix. To blend your pencil strokes into your usual hair, use a 45-degree spoolie brush.

Brow pencil hacks

Instead of using an unmistakable or colored temple gel, you can set the forehead by spraying hairspray into a Q-tip and gently brushing the soggy tip over the temple. 

Face Makeup

What is a foundation?

Foundation is a fluid, cream, or powdery cosmetic that is used on the face and neck to even out the complexion, conceal defects, and, in certain cases, change the natural skin tone. Some foundations can also be used as a moisturizer, sunscreen, astringent, or as a basic layer for more complicated cosmetics.

Why is foundation important for makeup base?

It evens out the skin tone and gives shine to the complexion. It reduces the size of big pores. Skin imperfections can be made to appear less apparent. The Foundation is used as a base for the remaining makeup.

How to choose a foundation according to your skin tone?

You've likely heard people describe their complexion and foundation as "cool," "toasty," or "balanced," and this is possibly the most important factor to consider when choosing the best foundation concealer for you. Undertones Connotation are the different shades that show up on your skin and give it a basic tone. Undertones have nothing to do with the color of your skin; your skin tone may change with the seasons, on the other hand, if you acquire a fake tan, your feelings will remain the same. Warm-feeling people have a lot of sweet, yellow, or sparkling glint on their skin, whereas cool-feeling people have a lot of pink, reds, and blue. The nonpartisan undercurrent is a good mix of warm and cool. You may look at your undertone in a variety of ways, ranging from looking at the color of your veins to holding a piece of white paper close to your face. 

Tips to apply foundation flawlessly

  • Make sure your skin is ready. Ensure your face is spotless before you begin applying foundation.
  • When applying foundation, make sure you have the right tools.
  • Working from within is a great way to start.
  • Choose a coverage that can be added to overtime.
  • Remember to take care of your shoulders and ears.

How do I prevent the foundation from getting cakey or patchy?

  • The importance of hydration cannot be overstated.
  • Choose a foundation with moderate or light coverage.
  • Apply foundation with a makeup sponge.
  • Only use powder when it's absolutely necessary.
  • Using a setting spray, melt your makeup together.

How to remove the foundation properly?

To remove foundation and blush, your everyday cleanser should be enough. Massage the cleanser into your skin for 15 seconds, paying special attention to your forehead, beneath your chin, as well as around your ears. Next clean with a damp, white cotton cloth to ensure that all of the makeup has been removed.

What is a highlighter?

Highlighters are products that reflect light and come in liquid, cream, and powder forms. They brighten your skin and give it a dewy glow, also making your cheekbones appear more prominent.

What does a highlighter do for your face?

The purpose of highlighting is to draw attention to the areas of your face in which light normally hits you, which are the high points. It makes sense to apply a highlighter to the nasal bridge because it is the highest place on the face. Make sure to mix it out so you don't end up with a sharp line running down your nose.

Where to apply highlighter?

Apply a highlighter on the cheekbones and forehead, down the nasal septum, beneath eyebrows, the inside corners of the eyes, and above the cupid's arch to catch the light and enhance your natural features. DO keep the rest of your makeup, such as base, blush, and highlighter, neutral and shimmer-free.

How to blend it?

To blend out your look, use a moist Beauty blender or a dense angled brush. Tap the vivid pink sponge over your foundation in small circles to incorporate it into your foundation if you're using it. If you're using a brush, swish it forth, back, and forwards until you have a uniform look.

Highlighter tips and hacks

  • In a bowl, place one spoonful of eyeshadow, preferably pink.
  • Add a pinch of gold dust powder to the mix.
  • Combine the two ingredients in a mixing bowl with 2-3 tbsp of coconut oil.
  • Mix all of the ingredients thoroughly until there are no lumps left.
  • Then, to make it creamy, add your favorite moisturizer.

What is loose powder?

One of the best forms of face powders is a loose powder, which is a miraculous product. It's primarily used as a finishing powder to keep your makeup in place and avoid creasing. To achieve a flawless and lightweight finish, a loose powder is carefully milled. For baking your makeup, loose powder is usually utilized.

How to use loose powder? 

After putting your foundation, put some loose powder on your cheeks with a powder brush. It prolongs the life of the foundation by preventing oils within your skin from soaking through. It also has a matte finish, making it ideal for oily skin.

How to bake foundation using loose powder?

To begin baking, remove the loose powder base from its container and dip a somewhat moist makeup sponge into it to collect a sufficient amount of powder. In the under-eye area, use this loose powder to set your concealer. You could also use the foundation to highlight your cheek contour by baking it slightly underneath it.

What is a concealer?

A concealer , also known as a color corrector, is a product that is utilized to disguise dark spots, dark circles, big pores, and other minor flaws on the skin. It's akin to the foundation but thicker, and it's used to blend different colors into the adjacent skin tone to mask imperfections.

Why is concealer important?

Concealer is among the most vital items for achieving a consistent finish, according to every makeup enthusiast. And anyway, it helps to conceal any skin flaws and gives your face a more even-toned and perfect appearance.

What does a concealer do?

Concealer is comparable to the foundation in that it conceals eye bags, age spots, blemishes, and other defects by masking colors and blending them into the skin. Always use concealer on top of your base to keep it from smudging.

How to choose your concealer?

The shade of concealer you choose should be based on the tone of your foundation. Because your skin tone fluctuates slightly due to regular sun exposure, beauty experts recommend having two hues of concealer in your arsenal, one lighter and one darker.

How to blend and set concealer?

Once your concealer has dried, mix it with a damp makeup sponge. Ensure that your concealer is flawlessly blended in and that everything is smooth. Ensure there are no wrinkles if you're planning to put powder on top. To blend the concealer, you can use your fingertips or a brush.

What is a primer?

A cosmetic primer is a cream that is placed before the next makeup to boost coverage and extend how long it lasts on the face.

How to use a primer?

Do you have any questions about how to apply face primer? It's straightforward. If you're using a moisturizer, apply it first, then wait a few minutes for it to dry. Apply a light coat of primer to the center of your face, pressing it in with your fingertips or a makeup sponge.

How to choose your primer?

Search for primers that have the words "moisturizing," "comforting," or "regenerating" in the title. If you do have clogged pores, use a mattifying primer. If you have a problem with extra sebum and shine, use your primer to combat it. A superb non-greasy primer that will limit your natural skin's production of oil is your best chance for this.

Why is it important for a good base?

Primers, as the name implies, help to prepare the face for the makeup which is about to be applied. It's noted for providing a flawless foundation base and making it easier to mix and apply items to the skin.

Primer hacks and tips

Combine one spoonful of glycerin with three spoonfuls of water until thoroughly combined. Pour it into a spray bottle with half a scoop of moisturizer. Before applying makeup, spray this mixture on your face and then let it dry.

What is pressed powder?

Pressed powder or Face powder is a makeup substance that is dusted on the face for a variety of purposes, the most common of which is to embellish the face. Face powder, which dates back to ancient Egypt, has been used for a variety of social purposes across civilizations, and it is now commonly used to fix makeup, illuminate the complexion, and sculpt the face.

Pressed powder vs loose powder

The recipe is the fundamental distinction between pressed and loose powders. Pressed powders are more pigmented and easier to utilize than loose powders. They offer more coverage, and a few of these can be used as foundations on their own.

How to apply pressed powder properly?

If you prefer to use a brush to apply your powder, be sure you dip your brush in pellets, dab off the surplus, or dip the brush into face powder, tap off the excess, and then compress the powder to your face with the brush. With a powder, just that little goes a long way.

How to prevent it from getting patchy?

  • Make use of a setting spray for your makeup.
  • Make sure the foundation is well blended.
  • Hydrate the area around your eyes.
  • Remove Any Excess.
  • Make use of face oil.
  • If you have oily skin, use a setting powder.
  • Putting excessive makeup on creased areas is not a good idea.
  • On crossed areas, use an eyeshadow primer.

What is a CC cream?

CC cream is a commercial word that evolved from the terms Blemish Balm cream and Beauty Balm. Some companies use the term "CC cream" to refer to a Color Correcting cream or Color Control, and several claim to lessen the appearance of redness or sallowness, as well as improve uneven skin tone.

CC cream tips and hacks

You can even use your fingers or a moist beauty blender to dab the cream onto your face.

What does a cc cream do?

It is used to remove discoloration, unevenness, or excess pigmentation. It is generally used as a one-step process so that you don't have to take the long way of applying primer, foundation, and coloration to smoothen out your skin.

How to apply CC cream?

  • Apply some moisturizer to your skin.
  • Choose a face moisturizer that complements your skin tone.
  • Apply the foundation.
  • Add Primer to the mix.
  • Sunscreen should be added.
  • After that, add a small bit of sunscreen to the mixture.
  • Combine them thoroughly.
  • If necessary, make changes.

What is a blush?

Blush (or bronzer, as it's known in the UK) is a facial cosmetic product that adds color to your cheeks to give the appearance of a genuine (or just not, according to the aesthetic you're trying for) glow.

How to apply blush properly and blend it?

Apply cream blush to your cheeks with a loose synthetic brush, brushing it from the cheekbones to the hairline. Then dab the remainder of the product onto your eyelids, mixing upwards into the eyebrow. You would not want to end up looking sick if you use any color along your lash line.

Different ways to apply blush

  • NATURAL: Only on the apple’s cheeks.
  • SCULPTED: Along the cheekbones.
  • SUNKISSED: All over the face.
  • DRAMATIC: along with the drapes of the face.

How to choose your shade?

Choose a blush that has the same hue as your skin for a natural effect. Choose a blush with the opposing tone as your complexion if you want a strong effect. If your skin tone is warm (yellow undertone), use a warm blush hue for a natural appearance and a cold blush color for a dramatic effect.

What is a makeup fixer?

Fixing spray is a beauty product that is used to keep make-up intact for extended periods of time. Setting spray is typically supplied in compact spray bottles and is administered by sprinkling droplets over the face to keep make-up fresh over many hours.

What does it do for your makeup?

These cosmetic fixers provide blinding glare makeup that resists melting, smudging, smearing, and disappearing in hot, humid, or sweaty environments. It plumps the skin's surface, offers a healthy radiance, and helps makeup stay longer thanks to its combination of mucopolysaccharide and light-reflecting colors.

How do you correctly set your makeup?

  • Primer and color corrector are the first two steps.
  • Lay the groundwork.
  • Concealing is the third step.
  • Blush, bronzer, and highlighter are the final steps.
  • Do your mascara, eyeshadow, and eyeliner.
  • Arrange your brows.
  • Lips are the seventh step.
  • Finish with a fixing spray or powder.

Makeup fixer hacks and tips

  • To begin, pour ½ cup of water into a container.
  • Step 2- Next add 1-two tbsp of aloe vera leaf extract to the mixture.
  • Step 3: Toss in a few drops of glycerin into the mix.
  • Step 4: Add 1-2 tablespoons of rose water at the end.

What is a sindoor?

Sindooram is an Indian cosmetic powder that is typically applied by married ladies around the area of their hairline. Sindoor is a visual identifier of a woman's marital status in Hindu communities, and discontinuing to use it typically means widowhood.

What does sindoor signify?

Red is the hue of the Sindoor (vermillion), which represents power and passion. Sindoor is traditionally manufactured from natural or organic and medicinal ingredients such as alum, turmeric, lime mercury, or saffron. Since offspring is one of the characteristics of marriage, Sindoor is a symbol of fertility.

How to apply sindoor properly?

When it comes to sindoor, the core of your hair is the finest place to use it. It's a timeless look. The color in the core of your hair is stunning and enhances your entire appearance. It looks great with a western outfit. Sindoor does not have to be worn solely with traditional Indian attire. Simply draw a small red dot on your forehead, which will complement your smokey eyes perfectly. You can wear it with everything from a dress to shorts.

Skin

What are cleansers?

A cleanser is a skincare product that removes make-up, cosmeceutical residue, germs, dead cells, sebum, sweat, grime, and other sorts of regular toxins from the face.

How to use cleansers?

  • Comb your hair back into a bun.
  • Please wash your hands.
  • Make Your Face Wet.
  • Cleanse your face with a cleanser.
  • Massage your face gently.
  • Rinse.
  • Dry your face with a towel.
  • Keep up with your skincare routine.

What do they do for your skin?

A facial cleanser is a skincare product designed to remove everyday filth such as cosmetics, dead skin cells, excess oil, and pollutants. Purging your face on a daily basis might help prevent clogged pores. Neglecting to clean up can result in a dull complexion due to buildup on the skin's outer layer.

DIY natural cleansers

Combine one teaspoon of honey with a few drops of lemon juice. To get a thinner consistency, add water and apply this mixture all over for a thorough scrub. Plain water should be used to clean. Honey can be used alone by people with sensitive skin, as lemon can irritate them.

What is toner?

Skin toner, or simply toner, refers to a cream, tonic, or wash used on the face to cleanse the skin and reduce the appearance of pores. It also hydrates, protects, and revitalizes the skin.

How to use toner?

Toners can be used in a variety of ways on the skin: On a cotton swath or directly spray onto the face. 

Why use toner?

The purpose of a toner is to rehydrate your skin without depriving it of its natural moisture. This means that toner will not irritate sensitive skin or cause excessive dryness. Toner also prepares the skin to absorb your post-purifying cream and any other skin medications you may use.

Why is using creams important?

In addition to calming and hydrating the skin after a long day, night creams can also aid in the initiation of repair by increasing cell turnover. While day creams are often designed to protect against the elements — pollution, dryness, cold, heat, and UV rays - night creams are more focused on the skin's renewing system.

What creams to use according to your concern?

Determine your skin type: oily, dry, sensitive, or a combination. The goal is to incorporate things into your routine that are specifically designed for your skin type. Assume you have dry skin and choose a product designed for smooth skin. You'll aggravate your dry skin all over.

How to apply cream properly?

On wet skin, keep applying your face cream. It will not work if you think your face will completely dry. When applied to damp skin, creams are better prepared to seal in moisture. Wipe your skin clean after you've finished.

Cream hacks

  • 2 teaspoons Aloe Vera Gel in a small glass dish or holder.
  • In this one, use Almond and Walnut Cold Squeezed Vegetable Oil. Combine the ingredients.
  • Combine the renewing balm, Vitamin E oil, and fragrance oil in a single container.
  • Keep the cream in a cold, dry place for up to a month after creating it.

What is a face mask and what does it do for your skin?

The purpose of a face masks is to hydrate and saturate the skin. Getting rid of excess oils. Working on your pores' visibility. Getting rid of impurities.

What type of mask to choose according to your concerns?

Look for coverings that have salicylic corrosive and other AHA/BHAs in them to help unclog pores. Items with strong fixes like earth and charcoal can help draw debasements and poisons from pores without drying out the skin.

How to properly apply and remove a face mask?

Make sure the cover's eye and mouth apertures are correctly positioned over your face. Allow the sheet to sit for about 20 minutes before discarding it. Do not clean up after removing the veil. Instead, use your fingers or a face rubbing tool to work the veil buildup into your skin.

What are makeup removers and how do they work?

Makeup removers mostly act by disintegration or solubilization, which means they break down and keep cosmetics broken down. Take, for example, the establishment — once applied, it dries and adheres to the skin since it is thought to be "like skin" more than other surfaces.

How to remove makeup properly?

  • Please take your time.
  • Makeup wipes aren't as effective as soap and water.
  • Make use of a makeup-removing cleanser.
  • Make sure to wipe your eyelid's edges as well.
  • Cleanse your hairline and push your hair back.
  • Cotton balls are preferable to flat cotton pads.
  • Always moisturize after removing your makeup.

DIY makeup remover

Honey and Baking Soda- This miraculous treatment is effective on all types of makeup. Wash your face with a clean towel that has been soaked in organic honey and sprinkled with baking soda. Baking powder and honey work nicely together as a cleanser and exfoliant.

Makeup remover tips and hacks?

  • Try one of these oil-based cosmetic cleansers that won't irritate your skin:
  • For those who adore oil-cleansing
  • 2 tablespoons of baby shampoo
  • 1 teaspoon extra virgin olive oil
  • half a cup of water
  • 1 tsp castor seed oil
  • Pads made of cotton.

Why are moisturizers important?

Moisturizing Reduces Skin Issues - Moisturizing on a daily basis might help to prevent excessive dryness or oiliness. Both extremes are damaging to the skin and can lead to acne and other skin problems. Covers up Other Splotchy Skin - Using a regular moisturizer helps to conceal blemishes on the skin.

How to choose a moisturizer according to your skin type?

Moisturizers having a thick consistency, such as creams and ointments, are more evenly spread on the skin and may last longer than lotions and tinctures, which have a thin/volatile consistency. So, while choosing a body moisturizer, look for one that has a thick consistency.

Moisturizer tips and hacks

  • Use it on damp skin.
  • Experiment with a water-based formula.
  • Use a small amount of highlighter.
  • Or even a small self-tanner.
  • Add it to your liquid foundation and mix it in.
  • Beforehand, apply facial oil.

What are face serums?

Face serums are moisturizing oils that can keep your skin as hydrated as many as 8-10 glasses of water. Face serum contains hyaluronic acid, which is a potent agent for locking hydration under the skin.

Why are they an important part of skincare?

Face serums help to rejuvenate your face and nourish it deeply. It is essential since it aids in the retention of your skin's natural hydration and provides an immediate boost. Face serums come in a variety of formulations, but it's crucial to choose one that's right for your skin type.

How to choose a serum according to your concerns?

Look for a serum that claims to perform exactly what you want it to do. Secondly, think about your skin type. Choose a face serum with salicylic acid and retinol, as well as rosehip seed oil, if your skin is oily and prone to skin inflammation. Try something with hyaluronic acid and Vitamin C if your skin is mature and dry.

How to apply serum properly?

Scrub and exfoliate your skin first, then use a toner or facial spray to finish. Then, using your fingertips or palms, gently apply a little amount of serum to your face and neck. Then, over the next 5 minutes, wait for your face serum to completely absorb into your skin.

Why is it important to sanitize from time to time?

Face washing is essential for preventing the spread of some diseases. When an infected individual hacks or wheezes, respiratory infections such as the common cold, influenza, and COVID-19 can spread by drops in the air. Direct touch with tiny organisms, diseases, and other disease-causing microbes can also disseminate them.

What is an SPF cream?

Sunscreen, often known as sunblock, sun cream, or suntan lotion, is a photoprotective skin item for the skin that absorbs or reflects a portion of the sun's intense radiation, protecting the skin against sunburn and, in particular, skin disease.

Why is sun defense important?

To protect against disease caused by harmful UV rays, as well as tanning, staining, and other cutaneous concerns.

How often do you reapply sunscreen?

In general, sunscreen should be reapplied on a regular basis, especially after swimming or sweating. If you work inside and sit away from windows, you may not need to apply again. However, keep in mind how frequently you go outside. As a precaution, have an additional jar of sunscreen at your workplace.

Nails

What is a nail polish top coat?

Nail enamel is a brand name for fingernail polish, which is also known as nail polish. It's usually packaged in a compact glass bottle with a twist-on cap and a brush attached. The nail polish is the fluid in the container that is applied to one's nails to give them color. The liquid solidifies and dries in a few minutes, creating a hard husk covering the nails.

How to apply nail paint properly?

  • Cuticle oil can also be used to spruce up unpainted nails.
  • Use nail polish remover to clean your nails.
  • Don't be stingy with the buffing.
  • During the parched time, add special effects.
  • A good base coat is essential.
  • Eyeliner brushes work well as erasers.
  • For slightly darker Manis, use painter's tape.

Tricks and hacks for quick application

If coldness or cold ice can speed up the drying of nail paint, the same idea can be applied to other household products. On days when you don't have access to a hairdryer, a quick rinse in a basin of ice water can suffice. Make sure you soak your natural nails in for at least a minute to enable the cuticle paint to set.

How to choose shades to match your skin?

Try aligning your fingernails to your skin tone when choosing a nail paint color. Nude tones, for example, look wonderful on lighter skin, whilst pastels and vibrant purples look best on darker skin. Rose or blues will let your fingers stand out regardless of whatever skin complexion you have.

How to use a nail paint remover?

  • Gather your materials and lay down a sheet of paper towel to catch any excess remover.
  • Put the cotton cover over the opening in the nail paint remover's lid.
  • Using nail polish remover, saturate the cotton round.
  • Apply pressure on your fingernail with the moistened cotton round. Rub the cotton across the nail in a circular motion, up and down.
  • Use as many cotton pads soaked in remover as you need.
  • Carry on with the treatment for each fingernail.
  • To remove any leftover residue or polish, use a fresh cotton piece soaked in nail polish remover and rub it over each nail.
  • Hands should be thoroughly washed with handwash/ soap and water.
  • Dry your hands with a towel.

How to remove nail paint properly?

Ethanol is a solvent, which means it aids in the breakdown of materials. It is possible to dissolve the polish by immersing your nails in methylated spirits or rubbing it on your nails with a moistened cotton ball.

What are nail enamels?

Consider the topcoat to be the armor that protects your manicure. It preserves the color from the elements, which can limit the duration of your manicure due to most everything from sun to water. The surface layer seals in the color and extends its life beyond what it would have had on its own.

What does it do for your nails?

When your nails are weak, nail enamels/ nail polish or foundation and top layers are especially beneficial since they give an additional protective layer against problems like dehydration and breakage.

How to properly apply a topcoat?

You can start with a base coat, then two or three layers of nail paint, and finally a topcoat. Ensure you're wearing new nail polish every time you apply it. When it comes to applying topcoats, getting sufficient of it is crucial, as the polish is typically applied gently. 

Accessories

Why use makeup brushes to apply makeup?

When it comes to applying makeup, brushes are much more flexible and can be incredibly exact. Because of their versatility, makeup brushes are indeed great if you prefer powder foundation to liquid foundation. A makeup brush also makes it much easier to add coverage.

Types of makeup brushes

Makeup brushes are of 10 different types:

  • Brush for foundation: The base brush is a must-have tool.
  • Brush for concealer: Next, we'll talk about the concealer brush, which is quite crucial.
  • Brush for blushing.
  • Brush for mascara.
  • Brush for eyeshadow.
  • Eyeliner brush with a fine point.
  • Lip brush and,
  • Smudger brush.

How to blend makeup properly with brushes

For broader parts of your face, such as the cavities of your cheekbones, your forehead, and your jawline, use the brush's higher point. After you've coated your entire face, blend in smaller areas using the bottom point of the brush, such as along the sides of your nose, over your sinuses, as well as around your eyes.

Must-have makeup brushes for beginners

  • Kabuki Brush with a Flat Top:
  • Make-up Brush
  • Blending Brush for Eyeshadow
  • Eyeshadow Brush (Small)
  • Liner Brush
  • Brush for powder

Makeup brush hacks

Make your brows more defined. Although it won't make sharp lines like a brow marker, you can use it to delicately fill in eyebrows with face powder (or even gels and creams). When you're done, flip it over and emphasize your eyebrow bone with the clean side.

Skincare tips for beginners

We suggest starting with a three-step approach for beginners: cleanse, moisturize, and apply sunscreen. Of obviously, depending on your specific skincare needs, this can be tweaked and products added. If you have acne, for example, you might want to try using a spot treatment.

Skincare routine sequence

  • The cleanser is the first step.
  • Step 2: Apply toner.
  • Antioxidant serum in step 3.
  • Step 4: Apply eye cream.
  • Step 5: Treatment of the spots.
  • Moisturizer in the 6th step.
  • Sunscreen is the 7th step.

Combos

What are lip combos?

Lip moisturizers, lip liners, lip cleansers, and even nail paints that match the lip color are included in some lip cosmetic sets. Other sets include cosmetics such as kajal, mascara, eyeliner, and foundation. You can pick a set based on your makeup preferences. 

Why are lip combos better?

Any makeup look may be elevated with the perfect lipstick and lip pencil combination. While a bright red pair might take a no-makeup beauty look in entirely other routes, a pastel lip liner and lipstick can enable your eyeliner to make a dramatic statement.

How to choose your perfect lip combo according to your needs?

While lip kits make it easy to combine two complementing products in one convenient package, you don't have to opt for a matchy-matchy look. Don't worry about having exactly the same hue in both lipstick and liner. In fact, contrast can make a room feel cooler. It's fine to mix and match tones and personalize your lip appearance.

What are face combos?

Determine your complexion by looking at your skin in ambient daylight: light, bright, moderate, brown, deep. Pay special attention to the area surrounding your jawline.

  • You have fair skin, which is quite pale or translucent, and you burn easily. There's a chance you'll have blemishes and some discoloration.
  • Pale skin: you have light skin. When you are exposed to the sun, you will burn and potentially tan.
  • Medium: you tan readily and don't burn easily, nor do you have sensitive skin.
  • Tan: you have a tan or olive complexion. Even in the cold, you seldom burn and appear brown.
  • Dark: you have dark skin and never get tanned. It's possible that your hair is dark brown or black.

The mixture skin type is characterized by rough, peeling skin on the cheekbones, as well as excess oil and shines on other parts of the face. The T-Zone, which comprises the temple, mouth, and chin, is a continual battleground for those with combination skin.

How to prep your face?

6 Steps to Getting Your Face Ready for Makeup

  • Cleanser: Use lukewarm water to wash your face.
  • Exfoliator: Do you want your makeup to have a cakey appearance? ...
  • Use a toner or a serum. After exfoliating your skin thoroughly, use a cleanser or serum and let it dry for a few seconds.
  • Eye Cream is a product that is used to help with the appearance of the eyes.
  • Use a moisturizer.
  • Primer.

How to choose your perfect lip combo?

You're aware of how well-defined brows may elevate your appearance? A flawlessly lined and filled pout, on the other hand, can make a major statement while also tying your entire appearance together. Just take a look at your social networking site's feeds to see what we're talking about. The ideal blend of lip pencil and lipstick is a popular trend that shows no signs of going away, from the lips of supermodels to that of your favorite celebrities. That means it's time to figure out how to combine these two items for a stunning lip makeup look, taking into consideration texture and color. As previously stated, the key to matching your makeup and lip liner is to think about both the finish and the hue. To begin, you'll want to match the finish to the finish. This means that matte lip liner should be paired with nude lipstick, glitter lip liner with glittery lipstick, and so on. Second, consider color. As a basic guideline. Use a lip liner that's one to two hues darker than your lip color to maintain everything in the same color family and undertones. Isn't that simple?

Makeup tips for beginners

  • Apply foundation first, then concealer.
  • Use a spoolie brush to groom your brows.
  • Before wearing lipstick, exfoliate your lips.
  • Don't forget about blush.
  • To make your pencil liner glide, melt it.
  • Use white eyeliner to bring your eyeshadow to life.
  • Draw the outline of your cat eye.

How to do eye makeup using eye combos?

It is indisputably true that sufficient preparation and preparation of your skin is critical for working on the utilization of your foundation and its lifespan. Setting aside some time to prepare your skin can have a huge impact on ensuring your foundation (and all the other items on top for that matter) lasts the entire day. Eye cosmetics, on the other hand, don't get nearly as much attention in the preparation and preparing arena as they could. Smoky eyes, winged liner, or a properly blended bronzy eye are frequently the most complicated and time-consuming aspects of a makeup routine, taking far longer than a simple swipe of red lipstick. It's just as important to prepare your eyelids as it is to focus on creating a fresh, immaculate line or flawlessly combining your eyeshadow. It may appear to be an insignificant step, yet it can have a major impact.

How to prep eyes?

If you want your eyes to look great, start with a smooth base. To prepare your eyes and create the best base for your eye cosmetics, use an eyeshadow primer. If you have smooth eyelids, a good primer will help your eyeshadow last longer and prevent wrinkling. A tinted base can assist to smooth out discoloration and make eyeshadow tones appear more vibrant. You can also daintily swipe your foundation on your eyelids for a completely smooth finish.

How to blend eyeshadow?

Any eye cosmetics step-by-step tutorial will show you how important a smooth and, surprisingly, the base is. Whether you prepare your eyes or not, one of the most important eyeshadow techniques is to use a base shadow all around your eyelid. The base color should be similar to your natural skin tone. Apply it on your eyelid and up to your wrinkle with a thickly pressed level eyeshadow mixing brush. This eyeshadow will help to even out your skin tone. To avoid uncompromising lines, use a clean mixing brush to softly blend the edges.

Hacks and tricks to apply eyeliner

One of the most mind-blowing eye cosmetics tips to open up little eyes or make the eyes look more brilliant is to utilize a light eyeshadow conceal in the internal corner. Use the tip of the level eyeshadow brush utilized in the past advance to get a shimmery or matte shade. Apply it to the inward corners of your eyes to carry a light to them. It helps on the off chance that you start with the lightest shade since you can ultimately apply hazier shades with a similar eyeshadow brush. You can likewise utilize a similar shade on your forehead bone as a highlighter. Apply eyeliner to a piece of floss (liquid is probably ideal) and press it diagonally on your skin. Repeat on your other eyelid, joining the two edges to form a triangle. Use your eyeliner to fill up the gaps.

Nail combos for a freshly manicured look

  • French Nail / White Tip Manicure
  • Classic Red Nails.
  • Bordeaux Nails. 
  • Chocolate Brown Nails.
  • Light Grey Nails.
  • Beige or Nude Nails.
  • Blush Nails.
  • Lilac Nails.

How to apply nail pain properly?

When choosing a nail clean, don't focus solely on the variety. Choose high-quality products that are popular in nail salons. If your nail cleaner has been sitting on the shelf for a while, be sure it's still good to use on your nails. If the nail cleaner has separated and does not combine after a quick shake, toss it out and obtain a new jug. You'll get unbalanced, untidy results if you use dried nail cleaner. Clean your hands and nails before beginning your nail trimming or pedicure. To shape and, shockingly, out your nails, use a record and a pillow. Move the nail document in one direction from the corner to the middle. It's important to remember that the nail document isn't a saw. It's best not to smear it across your nails because it can fragment and hurt your tips.

How to choose the right shade?

Do not ever go against your skin's natural tones unless you want to have messy makeup. If you have a warm complexion, choose a foundation with yellow undertones, and if you have a cool complexion, use a base with pink undertones.

Skin combos for all your skincare needs

  • Cleanser. It's critical to get rid of any nighttime accumulation.
  • Toner. Toner regulates your skin's pH levels and eliminates excess oil that your cleanser was unable to remove.
  • Serum. Serums, often known as therapies, moisturize and protect the skin.
  • Moisturizer. You'll need two moisturizers if you have mixed skin.
  • Use sunscreen.
  • Makeup.

Purifying should be done twice a day, once in the morning and once in the evening, according to the general guideline. While the early morning purifying helps to remove any traces of oil or perspiration left on your hair or skin, the evening cleansing helps to remove skin care goods as well as the oil, sweat, debris, and toxins that accumulate on the skin throughout the day.

Skincare tips for beginners

Beginners should use a gentle, moisturizing chemical that does not completely remove the moisture.

How to make a skincare routine?

  • Clean your face. Rinse your face with water every morning and night, then rub a tiny amount of cleaning solution between your clean palms. 
  • Use a toner.
  • Apply the serum.
  • Use an eye cream. 
  • Apply a spot treatment. 
  • Moisturize your skin. 
  • Use retinoid.
  • Use a face cream.
